headline: Superhero Anthology From Game Of Thrones Author Coming To Marvel Comics: Here Are The Details
summary: Fans of “Game of Thrones” are eagerly awaiting a new prequel series, and also have high hopes that author George R.R. Martin will publish more novels. Fans awaiting more books may be in for disappointment with Martin announcing a new project.

headline: Joe Rogan's 10 Most-Watched YouTube Videos
summary: Despite recent controversy, "The Joe Rogan Experience" remains one of the most popular podcasts, reaching an average of 11 million listeners per episode on Spotify (NYSE: SPOT).

headline: Cryptocurrency, Sports Betting Apps Surge Following Super Bowl Ads: Coinbase, DraftKings Lead The Way
summary: It's no secret that cryptocurrency ads dominated the commercial breaks during the 2022 Super Bowl. According to data from Sensor Tower, it looks like those expensive ad slots were worth the price.

headline: Trump's New Social Media App Experiences Partial Outage Upon Launching
summary: Just hours after launching on Sunday night in Apple Inc’s (NASDAQ: AAPL) App Store, Donald Trump's new social media app Truth Social encountered a “partial outage.”

headline: Ominous Death Cross Forms On Monolithic Power Systems's Chart
summary: If history is any guide, there may be trouble ahead for shares of Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ:MPWR).  A so-called "death cross" has formed on its chart and, not surprisingly, this could be bearish for the stock.

headline: If You Invested $1,000 When Apple Aired Its 1984 Super Bowl Ad, Here's How Much You'd Have Now
summary: Super Bowl LVI featured commercials that cost advertisers $6.5 million for a 30-second spot. Some of those ads will be remembered for years, while others will be easily forgotten.
